notes: Version 4.1.3. New: per-ISP client optimization. The worker serves a public GET /isp-profile that Nova clients fetch to auto-apply the best fingerprint and fragmentation for the carrier the user is on (matched by SIM MCC-MNC and network ASN), with tuned defaults per Iranian ISP (Irancell, MCI, Rightel, Shatel, MobinNet) that admins can override from the panel. Relay: secure by default (the built-in default key was removed so a fresh deploy is no longer an open relay; it refuses private, loopback, link-local and cloud-metadata addresses) with one-click Google Apps Script setup and the key stored in D1, so enable, disable and rotate take effect within seconds. Fixes: setting a specific clean-IP pool port (for example 443) now applies and sticks, the 0-RTT toggle now applies and reflects its real state, custom TLS fragmentation now works, and auto-update now reliably detects new releases (the version check compared versions incorrectly and always reported up to date). Self-hosting Nova VPS Server adds a configurable Hysteria2 UDP port (default 443, movable for UDP port-hopping) and a per-ISP profile editor. Drop-in worker replacement, no wrangler or binding changes; the D1 table it uses is created automatically.
